## Summary

Describe the change, its motivation, and any user-visible behavior.

## Validation

List the checks you ran and the exact dependency revisions used.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and updated relevant documentation.
- [ ] I ran the checks required by `CONTRIBUTING.md`, or explained why a check could not run.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, private robot data, customer data, or confidential logs.
- [ ] I identified the source and license of every new external asset or dependency.
- [ ] I described any change to robot, model, SDK, network, or safety behavior explicitly.
- [ ] I have permission to submit this contribution under Apache-2.0.
